Name: departments_aggregate
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments") SELECT json_build_object('__typename', 'departments_aggregate', 'aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('__typename', 'departments_aggregate_fields', 'count', COUNT(*), 'sum', json_build_object('budget', SUM("budget"), '__typename', 'departments_sum_fields'), 'max', json_build_object('budget', MAX("budget"), '__typename', 'departments_max_fields')) FROM "_root.base"), 'nodes', (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') FROM (SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT 'departments' AS "__typename", "_root.base"."id" AS "id") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root")) AS "departments_aggregate"
